title: centaurea langei subsp. geresensis
intro: Centaurea langei subsp. geresensis, a plant species within the Asteraceae family, is a rare and endemic variety of the Centaurea langei plant, commonly found in Turkey. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. Research suggests that it may provide various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress and inflammation, and potentially exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and purported health benefits.
